definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Agenda / Orden del día]
definitions.usage_example: What is on the agenda today?
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: What is on the agenda today?]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Una lista de temas a discutir en una reunión formal.]
definitions.usage_context_es: A list of items to be discussed at a formal meeting.

definitions.usage_example: What is your schedule for today?
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: What is your schedule for today?]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Un plan para llevar a cabo un proceso, dando listas de eventos y horas previstas.]
definitions.usage_context_es: A plan for carrying out a process or procedure, giving lists of intended events and times.
